research.name: Microsoft Corporation
research.description: Microsoft Corporation is an American multinational technology company which produces computer software, consumer electronics, personal computers, and related services. Its best known software products are the Microsoft Windows line of operating systems, the Microsoft Office suite, and the Internet Explorer and Edge web browsers. Its flagship hardware products are the Xbox video game consoles and the Microsoft Surface lineup of touchscreen personal computers. Microsoft ranked No. 21 in the 2020 Fortune 500 rankings of the largest United States corporations by total revenue; it was the world's largest software maker by revenue as of 2016. It is considered one of the Big Five companies in the U.S. information technology industry, along with Google, Apple, Amazon, and Facebook.

news.title: Does Your ETF Portfolio Reflect Your Goals? A Look at the SPDR Global Stock Market ETF vs. the Climate Paris Aligned ETF.
news.summary: This article compares two ETFs from State Street: the SPDR Global Stock Market ETF (SPGM) and the Climate Paris Aligned ETF (NZAC). SPGM offers broad, low-cost global equity exposure with nearly 3,000 holdings, while NZAC provides specialized, ESG-screened global exposure focused on climate transition risks and opportunities with fewer holdings. Investors choose between these based on whether they prioritize maximum diversification and lower costs (SPGM) or a climate-conscious investment strategy (NZAC).

news.title: Amazon's Bezos pushes Prime Video redesign focused on AI: Reuters
news.summary: Jeff Bezos is reportedly pushing for a major AI-focused redesign of Amazon's Prime Video streaming service, codenamed "Lighthouse." This initiative aims to showcase Amazon's significant investments in artificial intelligence by improving recommendations, search capabilities, and overall personalization for Prime Video's more than 200 million users. The redesign stemmed from Bezos's dissatisfaction with a previous proposal that failed to sufficiently emphasize AI, highlighting the company's efforts to enhance its AI stature amidst competition.

news.title: Arista Networks, Inc. $ANET Shares Sold by Mizuho Markets Cayman LP
news.summary: Mizuho Markets Cayman LP significantly reduced its stake in Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) during the first quarter, selling over 25,000 shares to end with holdings worth about $733,000. Despite this sell-off, Wall Street analysts maintain a "Buy" rating for Arista Networks, with an average price target of $189.74, reflecting confidence after the company's strong first-quarter earnings that surpassed EPS and revenue estimates. However, the article also highlights notable insider selling by CEO Jayshree Ullal and Kenneth Duda, alongside an array of institutional investors either adding to or reducing their positions in the technology company.

news.title: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Moves To Buy Embrace And Pushes Into Digital Experience Monitoring
news.summary: Palo Alto Networks announced its intention to acquire Embrace, a move aimed at expanding its Observability platform into Digital Experience Monitoring (DEM). This acquisition will integrate high-fidelity Real User Monitoring and proactive application performance validation tools, broadening Palo Alto Networks' focus beyond traditional cybersecurity to include user-centric performance data. This strategic shift positions the company to compete more directly with observability specialists like Datadog and Dynatrace, offering a unified platform for both security and performance across cloud and application environments.

news.title: Apple Could Seize a Quarter of the Foldable Phone Market in Year One
news.summary: Counterpoint Research predicts that the global foldable smartphone market will grow significantly in 2026, with Apple expected to capture a 25% market share in its first year. While Samsung is projected to maintain its leading position with 32%, Apple's entry is anticipated to boost consumer awareness and competitiveness in the premium foldable segment. The increasing relevance of AI and larger displays is seen as a key driver for foldable adoption.

news.title: Alphabet Shares Drop 3% Breaking Key Support, Technical Breakdown Risks Further 18% Decline
news.summary: Alphabet's stock price dropped 3.5% after the company raised its full-year capital expenditure guidance despite strong Q2 earnings, sparking concerns about cash flow. This technical breakdown saw the stock fall below the $333 support level, with analysts suggesting a potential further decline to $270. Major investment banks, however, maintain "Buy" ratings, citing robust AI monetization and cloud growth as justification for high infrastructure spending, making the stock's ability to reclaim the $333 mark a critical watchpoint.

news.title: Levin Capital Strategies L.P. Invests $4.35 Million in Vail Resorts, Inc. $MTN
news.summary: Levin Capital Strategies L.P. initiated a new position in Vail Resorts, Inc. (NYSE:MTN) during the first quarter, acquiring 33,910 shares valued at approximately $4.35 million. Despite this investment, Vail Resorts reported quarterly earnings of $8.81 per share, missing analyst expectations, although revenue of $1.21 billion slightly exceeded estimates but was down 7% year-over-year. Wall Street analysts currently maintain a "Hold" consensus rating for MTN with a target price of $151.45, while the stock recently traded around $144.81 after a slight decline.

news.title: NewEdge Wealth LLC Cuts Stake in Salesforce Inc. $CRM
news.summary: NewEdge Wealth LLC significantly reduced its stake in Salesforce Inc. ($CRM) by 7.5% in the first quarter, selling 18,014 shares and retaining 222,098 shares valued at over $41 million. This comes as Salesforce exhibits a solid financial performance, exceeding analyst earnings and revenue estimates in its latest quarter, and recently announced a quarterly dividend. The article also provides an overview of recent institutional investor activity, stock performance metrics, dividend details, and varying analyst sentiments ranging from positive to negative regarding Salesforce's future prospects and competitive landscape.

news.title: PNC Financial Services Group Inc. Boosts Stake in Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. $AMD
news.summary: PNC Financial Services Group Inc. increased its stake in Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) by 5.6% in the first quarter, acquiring an additional 21,176 shares, bringing its total holdings to 398,119 shares valued at approximately $80.99 million. This increased investment comes as AMD gains investor attention due to its partnership with Anthropic, which includes deploying up to 2GW of Instinct MI450 GPUs, and strong Wall Street support with analysts raising price targets after AMD's recent earnings beat expectations with a 37.8% year-over-year revenue increase. The company's stock has shown strong performance with a 1-year low of $149.22 and a high of $584.73, and analysts anticipate 6.25 EPS for the current fiscal year.

news.title: T. Rowe Price Has Increased Its Dividend for 40 Consecutive Years and Yields 4.4%. Is the Payout a Bargain or a Value Trap?
news.summary: T. Rowe Price, a mutual fund manager, boasts a 40-year streak of dividend growth and a 4.4% yield, but its stock has stagnated since mid-2022 due to investor focus on AI stocks. The article argues that while the stock appears cheap, it's not a value trap, as the company has continued to expand its assets under management. It suggests that once the AI mania subsides, T. Rowe Price's reliable dividend and long-term value will appeal to defensive investors.

news.title: Amazon under Senate investigation over China influence concerns - report
news.summary: Amazon (AMZN) is reportedly facing an investigation by the U.S. Senate Small Business Committee. The probe centers on allegations that the company permitted Chinese influence to impact its online marketplace. This information comes from a Bloomberg report, citing individuals interviewed during the investigation.

news.title: Amazon.com, Inc. $AMZN is Villere ST Denis J & Co. LLC's 6th Largest Position
news.summary: Villere ST Denis J & Co. LLC reduced its stake in Amazon by 5.5% in Q1, yet Amazon remains its 6th largest holding, comprising 3.6% of its portfolio. Amazon reported strong quarterly results, exceeding revenue and EPS expectations, with continued analyst bullishness driven by AWS, AI demand, and expanding Amazon Business sales. Despite some concerns about heavy AI spending and recent insider stock sales, the company's financial performance and market sentiment remain positive.

news.title: What is Apple? The company behind iPhone, Mac, and the App Store
news.summary: Apple Inc. designs and sells consumer electronics, software, and digital services, including the iPhone, Mac, iPad, and its various operating systems and service platforms like the App Store and Apple Music. Founded in 1976, Apple operates a highly integrated ecosystem and is known for its global retail stores and recent expansion into artificial intelligence under the Apple Intelligence brand. The company is publicly traded on Nasdaq under the ticker AAPL.

news.title: How Will NextEra Energy Stock React To Its Upcoming Earnings?
news.summary: NextEra Energy (NEE) is scheduled to report earnings on July 24, 2026. The article analyzes historical post-earnings stock reactions, finding that NEE has shown positive one-day returns 65% of the time over the past five years. It also provides a detailed table of historical 1D, 5D, and 21D returns and correlations to help event-driven traders assess potential short-to-medium term movements.

news.title: International Business Machines Corporation $IBM Stock Position Raised by CI Investments Inc.
news.summary: CI Investments Inc. increased its stake in International Business Machines Corporation (IBM) by 26.5% in the first quarter, now holding 118,132 shares worth over $28 million. Other institutional investors like Vanguard Group, State Street Corp, and Capital World Investors also significantly boosted their positions in IBM. The article also touches on recent analyst ratings, IBM's stock performance, and mixed sentiment surrounding its earnings, AI initiatives, and growth outlook.

news.title: First Citizens Bank & Trust Co. Buys 12,597 Shares of Salesforce Inc. $CRM
news.summary: First Citizens Bank & Trust Co. significantly increased its stake in Salesforce Inc. (NYSE:CRM) by 355% in the first quarter, acquiring an additional 12,597 shares to bring its total holdings to 16,145 shares valued at approximately $3.0 million. This move comes as Salesforce reported strong quarterly results, exceeding EPS and revenue expectations. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for Salesforce, despite some recent price target adjustments and downgrades.

news.title: First Trust Advisors LP Has $178.82 Million Stock Holdings in VeriSign, Inc. $VRSN
news.summary: First Trust Advisors LP increased its stake in VeriSign, Inc. by 20.6% during the first quarter, now holding 719,987 shares valued at $178.82 million. Other institutional investors like DV Equities LLC and Sunbelt Securities Inc. also adjusted their holdings. The article also details recent analyst ratings, with an average "Moderate Buy" consensus, and recent insider selling activity from VeriSign executives.

news.title: Bowie Capital Management LLC Invests $14.84 Million in MKS Inc. $MKSI
news.summary: Bowie Capital Management LLC has invested $14.84 million in MKS Inc. (NASDAQ:MKSI), acquiring 64,593 shares, making it their 22nd-largest holding. Institutional ownership of MKS Inc. stands at 99.79%, with several other hedge funds also adjusting their positions. Despite recent insider share sales, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $380.00 for MKS Inc., following strong quarterly earnings.

news.title: Conning Inc. Has $9.18 Million Stake in Amazon.com, Inc. $AMZN
news.summary: Conning Inc. has reduced its stake in Amazon.com by 13.9% in the first quarter, now holding 44,072 shares valued at approximately $9.18 million. Despite this, Wall Street analysts maintain a broadly bullish outlook on Amazon, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating and a price target of $312.91, following strong Q1 earnings that surpassed estimates. However, the company also faces scrutiny over its AI-related spending and recent layoffs within its AI division.

news.title: Andra AP fonden Has $3.88 Million Stock Holdings in VeriSign, Inc. $VRSN
news.summary: Andra AP fonden significantly reduced its stake in VeriSign, Inc. (NASDAQ:VRSN) by 88.4% in the first quarter, now holding 15,619 shares valued at $3.88 million. This comes as other institutional investors have either increased their positions or initiated coverage, with analysts generally rating VRSN as a "Moderate Buy" with an average price target of $325.25. Additionally, VeriSign executives have recently sold shares, while the company reported strong Q1 earnings, beating analyst estimates for both EPS and revenue.

news.title: Why Arista Networks Stock Rocketed 30% Higher in the First Half of 2026 and Why There's Likely More to Come
news.summary: Arista Networks (NYSE: ANET) saw its stock surge by nearly 30% in the first half of 2026, significantly outperforming the S&P 500, due to strong demand for its networking hardware driven by the proliferation of AI. The company delivered impressive Q4 2025 and Q1 2026 results, reporting record revenues and operating cash flow, and has raised its annual revenue outlook twice. Analysts widely rate Arista Networks as a "buy" or "strong buy," anticipating further upside, as the company is a leader in crucial data center technologies and expects to add more major customers.

news.title: Why Arista Networks Stock Rocketed 30% Higher in the First Half of 2026 and Why There's Likely More to Come

news.title: IBM's Q2 Deal Slippage Is a 'Temporary Speed Bump,' Says Michael Lee as CEO Arvind Krishna Says Delayed D
news.summary: Michael Lee of Michael Lee Strategy considers IBM's Q2 earnings miss a "temporary speed bump," a view echoed by CEO Arvind Krishna, who stated that about a third of delayed deals closed in early July. Despite a revenue shortfall, IBM maintains its profitability targets, adjusting full-year revenue growth guidance to 4-5% while emphasizing the strong demand for AI. The company's significant investment in AI infrastructure, however, is impacting its stock performance and weighing on the Dow 30.

news.title: Stryker’s Tens of Thousands of Wiped Devices: Iran Shifts From Espionage to Destruction
news.summary: In March 2026, Iranian hackers executed a destructive cyberattack on Stryker, a U.S. medical technology company, wiping tens of thousands of employee devices. This incident signifies a significant shift in Iranian cyber operations from traditional espionage to direct destructive attacks, likely in retaliation for geopolitical conflicts. The article emphasizes the need for organizations, especially in critical sectors, to update their threat models to include destructive scenarios and implement resilient defenses like offline backups and segmented administrative access.

news.title: e.l.f. Beauty (NYSE:ELF) Receives Average Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" from Analysts
news.summary: e.l.f. Beauty (NYSE:ELF) has received a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts, with an average 1-year price target of $80.38. The company recently exceeded quarterly earnings and revenue expectations, showing a 35.1% year-over-year revenue increase. Despite positive analyst outlooks, there has been notable insider selling, although institutional investors maintain significant holdings.

news.title: MEDP: Medpace Holdings Inc Latest Stock Price, Analysis, News and Trading Ideas
news.summary: This article provides the latest stock information for Medpace Holdings Inc (MEDP), including its pre-market price, market capitalization, and key financial metrics. It also highlights recent news, such as Medpace beating Q2 earnings and revenue estimates, and identifies it as a top growth stock. The report includes related discussions on other trending stocks like GOOGL, SMCI, and RKLB.

news.title: Life360 (ASX:360): Family Safety App Falls Sharply as US Tech Sentiment Weighs
news.summary: Life360 Inc (ASX:360) shares dropped 5.61% to $24.08 during afternoon trading on July 23, 2026, amid a broader decline in Australian and US technology indices. The S&P/ASX 200 Information Technology Index (ASX: XIJ) was down 2.71%, and the NASDAQ closed 0.57% lower the prior session, indicating a cautious sentiment weighing on tech stocks. Despite the short-term dip, the company, a global family safety and location-sharing platform, is evaluated by investors based on long-term metrics such as monthly active user growth, subscription conversion rates, and operational efficiency rather than daily price fluctuations.
